name: Blinded
description: Cannot see; auto-fails any check requiring sight.
effects: Attack rolls against the creature have advantage; the creature's attack rolls have disadvantage.

name: Charmed
description: Cannot attack the charmer or target the charmer with harmful abilities or magical effects.
effects: The charmer has advantage on social interaction Charisma checks against the charmed creature.

name: Deafened
description: Cannot hear; auto-fails any check requiring hearing.

name: Exhaustion
description: Six levels of exhaustion. Effects accumulate.
effects: Lvl 1: Disadvantage on ability checks. Lvl 2: Speed halved. Lvl 3: Disadvantage on attacks and saves. Lvl 4: HP max halved. Lvl 5: Speed = 0. Lvl 6: Death. Long rest reduces by 1 (food + water consumed).

name: Frightened
description: Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls while source of fear is in line of sight; cannot willingly move closer to the source.

name: Grappled
description: Speed = 0; cannot benefit from speed bonuses. Ends if grappler incapacitated or moved out of reach.

name: Invisible
description: Heavily obscured for purposes of being seen; not auto-hidden (still detectable by sound and tracks).
effects: Attacks against creature have disadvantage; creature's attacks have advantage.

name: Paralyzed
description: Incapacitated; cannot move or speak; auto-fails STR and DEX saves; attacks against the creature have advantage; any attack that hits the creature is a critical hit if the attacker is within 5 ft.

name: Petrified
description: Transformed (with non-magical possessions) into solid inanimate substance. Weight x10; ages stop. Incapacitated; cannot move/speak; unaware of surroundings; attacks against have advantage; auto-fails STR and DEX saves; resistance to all damage; immune to poison and disease (current poison/disease suspended).

name: Poisoned
description: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

name: Prone
description: Only movement option is crawl unless standing up. Standing costs half speed. Disadvantage on attack rolls. Attack rolls against the creature have advantage if attacker within 5 ft, disadvantage if attacker is more than 5 ft away.

name: Restrained
description: Speed = 0. Disadvantage on attack rolls and DEX saves. Attacks against creature have advantage.

name: Stunned
description: Incapacitated; cannot move; speak only falteringly. Auto-fails STR and DEX saves. Attacks against have advantage.

name: Unconscious
description: Incapacitated; cannot move or speak; unaware. Drops what it holds; falls prone. Auto-fails STR and DEX saves. Attacks against have advantage. Critical hit if attacker within 5 ft.
